entrance.description: You stand before a towering wall of glowing runes. The ancient firewall pulses with protective magic.

objects.name: Buffer Rune
objects.description: A glowing rune inscribed with memory allocation symbols.

corridor.description: A narrow passage lined with flickering runes. The air hums with magical energy.

objects.name: Cascade Rune
objects.description: A rune that resonates with nearby magical disturbances.

core.description: The heart of the firewall. A massive crystalline structure pulses with power.

objects.name: Breach Rune
objects.description: The final rune. When the firewall falls, this rune grants access.
